---
title: " "
pagetitle: "About me"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
about:
  template: solana
  image: "img/ANA_1857.jpg"
  links:
    # - icon: twitter
    #   text: Twitter
    #   href: https://twitter.com/rocardenasr
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/roberto-cárdenas-retamal-2ba2a5126 
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:robertocardenasr@ufl.edu"  
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons:google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=sfOOqUkAAAAJ&hl=es
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

:::{#hero-heading}
:::

I’m a PhD candidate in the Fisheries and Aquatic Sciences program at the University of Florida. My research focuses on seafood markets, sustainable consumption, and the nutritional impacts of seafood on consumers. My dissertation explores how incentives and product attributes influence consumer behavior in seafood markets.

--- 

You can find my research papers and ongoing projects [on this page](research/index.qmd) 


:::{.callout-note collapse="false"}

I am currently on the academic job market for positions starting in Fall 2026

:::

---

```{=html}
<div class="visitor-map-section">
  <h3 class="visitor-map-title">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-earth-americas"></i>&nbsp; Visitors
  </h3>
  <div class="visitor-map-container">
    <!-- ClustrMaps widget — replace XXXXXXXX with your site ID from clustrmaps.com -->
    <!-- To get your ID: go to https://clustrmaps.com → Add site → enter robcareta.github.io → copy the widget code -->
    <script type='text/javascript' id='clustrmaps'
      src='//cdn.clustrmaps.com/map_v2.js?cl=ffffff&w=a&t=tt&d=XXXXXXXX&co=005f73&ct=ffffff&cmo=3acc3a&cmn=ff5353'>
    </script>
    <p class="visitor-map-placeholder" style="display:none">
      <em>Visitor map loading…</em>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```
